name: vp_market_intelligence
description: AI-powered market intelligence with actionable BUY/SELL/WAIT verdict. Quick mode: technicals + sentiment + backtest in ~30s. Full mode: TrinityCouncil 3-agent deliberation (Bull vs Bear vs Neo) with scoring breakdown, entry/exit zones, and strategy-specific exit profiles. Covers VIRTUAL, AIXBT, BTC, ETH. Neo's live track record included as credibility proof.

mode.description: quick (~30s): technicals+sentiment+backtest. full (~120s): adds TrinityCouncil 3-agent deliberation with bull/bear cases and scoring breakdown
